zh.lifeSummary: 當Simona Camilla di Capocorso於1197年出生在義大利馬薩 E 卡拉拉利其亞納 納迪瓦藍諾時，她的父親Raimondo della Volta27歲，母親Simona Camilla27歲。她於1224年與Tedisio IV Fieschi在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1248年在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦拉維阿尼亞享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simona Camilla di Capocorso于1197年出生在意大利馬薩 E 卡拉拉利其亞納 納迪瓦藍諾时，她的父亲Raimondo della Volta27岁，母亲Simona Camilla27岁。她于1224年与Tedisio IV Fieschi在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1248年在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦拉維阿尼亞享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Simona
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Simon  , now also quite frequently used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Camilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman family name Camillus, of obscure and presumably non-Roman origin. According to tradition, recorded by the Roman poet Virgil , Camilla was the name of a warrior maiden, Queen of the Volscians, who fought in the army of Aeneas (Aeneid 7:803–17).

variants.name: Camillo
meanings: From the Roman family name Camillus. St Camillo de Lellis ( 1550–1614 ) founded the nursing order of the Ministers of the Sick.

en.lifeSummary: When Simona Camilla di Capocorso was born in 1197, in Varano, Licciana Nardi, Massa e Carrara, Italy, her father, Raimondo della Volta, was 27 and her mother, Simona Camilla, was 27. She married Tedisio IV Fieschi in 1224, in Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1248, in Lavagna, Genova, Liguria, Italy, at the age of 51.

fr.Varano, Massa-Carrara, Toscana, Italy: Varano, Licciana Nardi, Massa e Carrara, Italie
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simona Camilla di Capocorso est née en 1197, à Varano, Licciana Nardi, Massa e Carrara, Italie, son père, Raimondo della Volta, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Simona Camilla, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Tedisio IV Fieschi en 1224, à Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1248, à Lavagna, Genova, Liguria, Italie, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.Varano, Massa-Carrara, Toscana, Italy: Varano, Licciana Nardi, Massa e Carrara, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Simona Camilla di Capocorso 1197 in Varano, Licciana Nardi, Massa e Carrara, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raimondo della Volta 27 und ihre Mutter Simona Camilla 27. Sie hat 1224 in Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Tedisio IV Fieschi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1248 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Lavagna, Genova, Liguria, Italien.

Lei sposato Tedisio IV Fieschi nel 1224, nel Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1248, nel Lavagna, Genova, Liguria, Italia, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.Varano, Massa-Carrara, Toscana, Italy: 이탈리아 마사  카라라 리c샤나 나르디 바랜오
ko.lifeSummary: Simona Camilla di Capocorso(이)가 1197년 이탈리아 마사  카라라 리c샤나 나르디 바랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raimondo della Volta(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Simona Camilla(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1224년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에서 Tedisio IV Fieschi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1248년 이탈리아 리구리아 노바 라바그나에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simona Camilla di Capocorso nasceu em 1197, em Varano, Licciana Nardi, Massa e Carrara, Itália, seu pai, Raimondo della Volta, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Simona Camilla, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Tedisio IV Fieschi em 1224, em Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.Varano, Massa-Carrara, Toscana, Italy: варано, ликсяна нарди, масса э каррара, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simona Camilla di Capocorso родилась в 1197 г. в местности варано, ликсяна нарди, масса э каррара, Италия, её отцу по имени Raimondo della Volta было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Simona Camilla, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tedisio IV Fieschi в 1224 г. в местности чамбeри, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1248 г. в местности лавагна, дженова, лигуря, Италия в возрасте 51 год.
